calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ali Almakrai, Tel. 415.574.1722, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

ASSIGNEE GALAXY PORTFOLIOS, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

RULING: There being no appearance by assignee/opposing party GALAXY PORTFOLIOS, LLC, the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Ali Almakrai is granted. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-31-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
